title: Elemental Creepers Continued
description: Adds many creeper variants with unique elemental effects, terrain changes, and combat behaviors.
body:
# Elemental Creepers Continued

Elemental Creepers Continued is a NeoForge port of the original Elemental Creepers mod for Minecraft 1.21.1.

This mod adds many creeper variants with unique effects, world interactions, and combat gimmicks. Instead of every creeper being a normal explosion, different variants can burn terrain, freeze areas, summon lightning, flood caves, place cobwebs, launch entities, or even alter blocks around them.

## Features

The mod includes many themed creepers, such as:

- **Fire Creeper** - spreads fire around the blast area.
- **Ice Creeper** - freezes water into ice, turns lava into cobblestone or obsidian, and leaves snow behind.
- **Electric Creeper** - calls down lightning on nearby entities.
- **Water Creeper** - creates water and puddles where it explodes.
- **Magma Creeper** - fills the area with flowing lava.
- **Earth Creeper** - replaces nearby air with dirt.
- **Light Creeper** - places glowstone around the explosion area.
- **Spider Creeper** - climbs walls, places cobwebs, and poisons nearby entities.
- **Psychic Creeper** - launches nearby entities instead of acting like a normal explosion.
- **Ghost Creeper** - causes an entity-focused explosion effect.
- **Illusion Creeper** - splits into fake copies before detonating.
- **Reverse Creeper** - swaps blocks above and below, flipping terrain vertically.
- **Dark Creeper** - breaks configured blocks and drops their loot.
- **Cookie Creeper** - explodes into cookies.
- **Celebration Creeper** - creates candles, cake, and fireworks.
- **Friendly Creeper** - a tameable creeper that can follow, sit, breed, and attack for its owner.

Some elemental creepers can also create additional surprises, such as ghost variants appearing after death depending on config settings.

## Port Information

This project is a port / continuation of the original **Elemental Creepers** mod for newer Minecraft versions on NeoForge.

Original mod by **xSmallDeadGuyx**:  
https://modrinth.com/mod/elemental-creepers

## License and Attribution

This port is distributed under **GPL-3.0-only**.

The original project is credited to **xSmallDeadGuyx**.  
Please see the repository and included license information for attribution and licensing details for this port and the original work.
